allow: Bash(node -e "const redis = require\(''ioredis''\); const r = new redis\({host:''localhost'',port:6379,lazyConnect:true}\); r.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\(''redis ok''\);r.quit\(\)}\).catch\(e=>console.log\(''redis error:'',e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\(''d:/lvguanjia/web/node_modules/antd-mobile-icons''\); const valid = new Set\(Object.keys\(icons\)\); const grep = require\(''child_process''\); const out = grep.execSync\(''grep -rh ""from .antd-mobile-icons""'' + '' d:/lvguanjia/web/src --include=*.tsx --include=*.ts -A0''\).toString\(\); const imports = out.match\(/[A-Z][a-zA-Z]+\(?:Outline|Fill\)/g\) || []; const invalid = [...new Set\(imports\)].filter\(i => !valid.has\(i\)\); console.log\(''Invalid icons:'', invalid\);")
